subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Youth to one among His maidservants, that she may be drawn by the call of the All-Merciful, which hath been raised from this direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی امة من امائه لیجذبها ندآء الرحمن الذی ارتفع عن جهة
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
